  1. org.eclipse.collections.api.map.primitive
  2. LongCharMap

Uses of Interface
org.eclipse.collections.api.map.primitive.LongCharMap

Packages that use LongCharMap
Package
Description
org.eclipse.collections.api.factory.map.primitive
 
org.eclipse.collections.api.map.primitive
This package contains API for primitive to primitive maps, primitive to object maps and object to primitive maps with mutable and immutable variants.
org.eclipse.collections.impl.map.immutable.primitive
This package contains implementations of the immutable primitive-primitive, primitive-object and object-primitive map interfaces.
org.eclipse.collections.impl.map.mutable.primitive
This package contains implementations of the mutable primitive-primitive, primitive-object and object-primitive map interfaces.

  • Uses of LongCharMap in org.eclipse.collections.api.factory.map.primitive

    Methods in org.eclipse.collections.api.factory.map.primitive with parameters of type LongCharMap
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ImmutableLongCharMap
    ImmutableLongCharMapFactory.ofAll(LongCharMap map)
    Same as ImmutableLongCharMapFactory.withAll(LongCharMap).
    MutableLongCharMap
    MutableLongCharMapFactory.ofAll(LongCharMap map)
    Same as MutableLongCharMapFactory.withAll(LongCharMap).
    ImmutableLongCharMap
    ImmutableLongCharMapFactory.withAll(LongCharMap map)
     
    MutableLongCharMap
    MutableLongCharMapFactory.withAll(LongCharMap map)

    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    ImmutableLongCharMap
    This file was automatically generated from template file immutablePrimitivePrimitiveMap.stg.

    This file was automatically generated from template file mutablePrimitivePrimitiveMap.stg.
    Methods in org.eclipse.collections.api.map.primitive that return LongCharMap
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    LongCharMap
    CharLongMap.flipUniqueValues()
    Return the LongCharMap that is obtained by flipping the direction of this map and making the associations from value to key.
    LongCharMap
    LongCharMap.reject(LongCharPredicate predicate)
    Return a copy of this map containing only the key/value pairs that do not match the predicate.
    LongCharMap
    LongCharMap.select(LongCharPredicate predicate)
    Return a copy of this map containing only the key/value pairs that match the predicate.
    Methods in org.eclipse.collections.api.map.primitive with parameters of type LongCharMap
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MutableLongCharMap.putAll(LongCharMap map)
    Puts all of the key/value mappings from the specified map into this map.
